description: Mermaid Chart provides browser-based tools for creating, editing, and sharing Mermaid diagrams, plus AI-assisted diagram generation features. The site also hosts the open-source Mermaid documentation and ecosystem resources.
summary: Mermaid.ai exposes MCP endpoints for Mermaid diagram generation/validation: a public Claude MCP app at `https://chatgpt.mermaid.ai/anthropic/mcp` and authenticated Mermaid MCP server endpoints at `https://mcp.mermaid.ai/mcp` (streamable HTTP) and `https://mcp.mermaid.ai/sse` (SSE).
